name: think-it-through
description: Develop complex ideas with AI through a domain-neutral conversation control layer.

interface.shortDescription: Write the thought. Command the next move.
interface.longDescription: Develop complex ideas across long, nonlinear conversations with composable commands that give the agent an explicit job, default target, flow, and result.
defaultPrompt: $think-it-through:think-it-through Adopt this conversation and help me think it through.
$think-it-through:think-recap Recover the full shape of this conversation.
$think-it-through:think-to-brief Turn this thinking into a reusable brief.
